title: Ordivon Verify External Configuration
description: Minimal external configuration schema for Ordivon Verify. Describes an external repo's verification setup without requiring full Ordivon DG Pack fields. This is a prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

project_name.description: Human-readable project name for report display.

mode.description: Verification mode. advisory: warnings allowed. standard: configured checks must pass. strict: all checks required.

receipt_paths.description: Relative paths to directories containing receipt markdown files.
